titles.title: To take certain land in the State of California into trust for the benefit of the Pechanga Band of Indians, and for other purposes.
To take certain land in the State of California into trust for the benefit of the Pechanga Band of Indians, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Indian and Insular Affairs.
Subcommittee on Indian and Insular Affairs Discharged
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by Unanimous Consent.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Natural Resources. H. Rept. 119-585.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 505.

committee.name: House Natural Resources
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
